zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily de Baldock於1312年出生在英國諾福爾可斯瓦福哈姆時，她的父親Thomas de Baldock28歲，母親Mrs Thomas de Baldock28歲。她與Robert de Weyland結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1350年在英國素瑞享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily de Baldock于1312年出生在英国諾福爾可斯瓦福哈姆时，她的父亲Thomas de Baldock28岁，母亲Mrs Thomas de Baldock28岁。她与Robert de Weyland结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1350年在英国素瑞享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Baldock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Hertfordshire, first named in the 12th century by the Knights Templar, who held the manor there. It was named in commemoration of the city of Baghdad, known in Middle English and Old French as Baldac.

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily de Baldock was born in 1312, in Swaffham, Norfolk, England, her father, Thomas de Baldock, was 28 and her mother, Mrs Thomas de Baldock, was 28. She married Robert de Weyland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1350, in Surrey, England, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily de Baldock est née en 1312, à Swaffham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Baldock, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs Thomas de Baldock, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Weyland. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1350, à Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily de Baldock 1312 in Swaffham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Baldock 28 und ihre Mutter Mrs Thomas de Baldock 28. Sie hat Robert de Weyland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1350 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Surrey, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily de Baldock è nata il nel 1312 nel Swaffham, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Thomas de Baldock, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Mrs Thomas de Baldock, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Weyland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1350, nel Surrey, England, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily de Baldockが1312年にイギリスノーフォルクスワフハムで生まれた時，父Thomas de Baldockは28歳，母Mrs Thomas de Baldockは28歳であった。Robert de Weylandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1350年にイギリススリーで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily de Baldock(이)가 1312년 영국 노르폴크 스와프함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Baldock(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Thomas de Baldock(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Robert de Weyland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 영국 수리에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily de Baldock nasceu em 1312, em Swaffham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Baldock, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Thomas de Baldock, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Weyland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1350, em Surrey, Inglaterra, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily de Baldock родилась в 1312 г. в местности сваффхам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Baldock было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Thomas de Baldock, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Weyland. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1350 г. в местности сурри, Англия в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily de Baldock nació en 1312, en Swaffham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Baldock, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mrs Thomas de Baldock, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Robert de Weyland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1350, en Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años.
